narrative:
Grand Prairie Twp. township has 1,100 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.9 percentage points.
